name: I have a pre-existing bad back, will work injury claim get denied?
description: Aggravation of pre-existing is covered—need medical proof of work link[4][5].

mainEntity.name: I have a pre-existing bad back, will work injury claim get denied?

acceptedAnswer.text: Aggravation of pre-existing is covered—need medical proof of work link[4][5].
acceptedAnswer.description: **No, if work accident aggravated your pre-existing condition, it's compensable.** Prior injuries don't bar claims if new incident caused worsening, as in multi-injury cases[4]. **Key factors:** Medical expert testimony on aggravation vs. prior alone, work history showing functionality before. **Practical guidance:** Disclose history honestly to doctors, get causation opinion, file promptly. ISIF in Idaho may cover combined disabilities[4]. Appeal denials. **Prove work was 'a cause'[5].**
